products.name: Livingdevops Classic Tee
products.description: Premium black cotton t-shirt with the iconic >_ Livingdevops logo. Soft, breathable fabric for long coding sessions and conference days. Available in unisex sizing — wear your DevOps pride.

products.name: Livingdevops Dev Mug
products.description: Matte black ceramic mug with cyan >_ branding. Holds 350ml of your favorite fuel — coffee, tea, or kubectl commands. Microwave safe. The official mug of late-night deploys.

products.name: Livingdevops Sticker Pack
products.description: Set of 3 premium vinyl die-cut stickers: >_ terminal badge, Kubernetes wheel, and Livingdevops wordmark. Weatherproof and laptop-safe. Show the world you live DevOps.

products.name: Kubernetes in Production
products.description: The definitive eBook for running Kubernetes in real environments. Covers cluster design, workloads, networking, storage, security, and troubleshooting — written from hands-on EKS and Kind experience.

products.name: The DevOps Builder's Handbook
products.description: A practical eBook on building cloud-native systems from scratch. CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, observability, and the mindset shift from ops to DevOps engineering.

products.name: Microservices Patterns Cheat Sheet
products.description: Compact eBook reference covering API gateways, event-driven architecture, saga patterns, circuit breakers, and service mesh — mapped to the 6-service Livingdevops platform.

products.name: CKA Crash Course
products.description: Intensive video course preparing you for the Certified Kubernetes Administrator exam. 8 modules with hands-on labs on this very platform — pods, services, ingress, RBAC, and troubleshooting.

products.name: EKS from Zero to Production
products.description: Complete course on deploying production-grade Amazon EKS clusters. Node groups, IRSA, ALB ingress, CloudNativePG, Vault secrets, and GitOps with ArgoCD — end to end.

products.name: GitOps with ArgoCD Masterclass
products.description: Learn continuous delivery the GitOps way. ApplicationSets, sync policies, progressive rollouts, and managing multi-environment deployments — using the Livingdevops repo as your lab.
